summary: The diff implements most loading-related fixes across multiple components and hooks. LoadingTimeout was enhanced with retry functionality, useQueries hooks were optimized with proper actor dependency checks and loading state composition, SwipeableGallery fixed React Hooks violations, and ProductBrowse improved loading state handling. However, REQ-4's backend actor verification constraint was violated (useActor.ts was modified per constraint), and there's insufficient evidence of comprehensive testing for infinite loops or error boundary handling.

missing_requirements.requirement: Error boundaries handle any loading failures gracefully
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence in the diff of error boundary implementation or modifications to handle loading failures gracefully. Only basic error handling with toast notifications is shown.

missing_requirements.requirement: Query invalidation logic does not cause cascading re-renders
missing_requirements.reason: While query invalidation calls are present in mutations (useAddProduct, useUpdateProduct, useSaveCallerUserProfile), there is no evidence of verification or optimization to prevent cascading re-renders. The diff shows invalidateQueries calls but no protective measures.

hallucinated_features.description: PromotionalImage component with lazy loading in ProductBrowse.tsx
hallucinated_features.reason: This component appears in the diff but was not requested in the BuildRequest. It's a new feature unrelated to fixing the loading issue.

hallucinated_features.description: GalleryImage component extracted as separate component in SwipeableGallery.tsx
hallucinated_features.reason: While fixing hooks usage was required, extracting GalleryImage as a new component and adding individual image loading states goes beyond the scope of fixing the loading issue. This is a refactoring/enhancement not requested.
